pages.body: Welcome to a surreal, narcotic exploration of insomnia where the narrator refuses rescue, choosing instead to dissolve into a hypnotic loop of dissociation. This dark melodic trap track floats at 123 BPM over eerie soul chords and ghostly vocal chops, creating an immersive late-night atmosphere. Experience heavy 808 basslines that shake the floor while airy female R&B harmonies layer against high-pitched male chants. The journey moves from desperate entreaty to fractured denial, capturing chronic pain and nightmare fuel in every sparse verse. As the beat drops, feel the collapse of reality under a glowing bottle by your bed. This is not about getting better; it's about staying lost just one more night.
pages.styleSentence: A dark melodic trap track at 123 BPM featuring a heavy 808 bassline and sparse verses that float over eerie soul chords and ghostly vocal chops to create an immersive late-night insomnia atmosphere.

pages.text:
[Intro - Whispered Male]
Don’t save me
Don’t save me
Don’t save me now

[Female Vocal - Airy]
Close your tab
Fall through the ceiling

[Male Chant - High, Hypnotic]
Drink
Drink
Drink
Drink

Drink
Drink
Drink
Drink

[Beat Drops - Heavy 808]

[Hook - Male Chant]
Drink, drink, drink, drink
I don’t wanna feel tonight
Drink, drink, drink, drink
Put my sorrow in the light

Drink, drink, drink, drink
Bottle glowing by my bed
Drink, drink, drink, drink
Pain keeps pounding in my head

[Ad-Libs - High, Warped]
Drink
Drink
Drink
Yeah
Drink
Drink
Don’t save me

[Verse 1 - Melodic Rap/R&B]
I been out with the ghosts again
Dark glass to my face
City bleeding through the window
Smoke caught in the bass

I don’t need another promise
I don’t need another sign
I just need this buzz to vanish
For a little piece of time

Voices in the walls
But they sound like me
Heart doing laps
Moving lazily

I keep saying I’m fine
But the night won’t believe me
So I tell my soul

[Pre-Hook - Female Background]
Sink down
Sink deep
Let go
Don’t speak

Sink down
Sink deep
Let go
Don’t drink

[Hook - Male Chant, Bigger]
Drink, drink, drink, drink
I don’t wanna feel tonight
Drink, drink, drink, drink
Put my sorrow in the light

Drink, drink, drink, drink
Bottle glowing by my bed
Drink, drink, drink, drink
Pain keeps pounding in my head

[Post-Hook - Call & Response]
[Male] Drink
[Female] Don’t save me
[Male] Drink
[Female] Don’t chain me

[Male] Drink
[Female] I’m fading
[Male] Drink
[Female] Still praying

[Verse 2 - Dark Soul Flow]
I hear my name in the ceiling fan
I see my shame in the smoke
Every blessing got a bottle
Every prayer hits my throat

I been running on empty
But the shots still hit
I been laughing in public
Then I vanish so quick

Don’t call me strong
I’m just trained not to fold
Don’t call me lost
I just walk with this hole

And if tomorrow wants me
Tell tomorrow hold on
I’m under these drums
Trying to sway this storm

[Breakdown - Stripped, Dreamy]
[Female Vocal]
Drink
Drink
Baby, let it go

Drink
Drink
There’s a better road

[Male - Whispered]
Don’t save me now
Don’t save me now
Don’t save me now

[Build - Chant Layering]
Drink
Drink
Drink
Drink

Drink
Drink
Drink
Drink

Drink, drink, drink, drink
Drink, drink, drink, drink

[Final Hook - Full Energy]
Drink, drink, drink, drink
I don’t wanna feel tonight
Drink, drink, drink, drink
Put my sorrow in the light

Drink, drink, drink, drink
Bottle glowing by my bed
Drink, drink, drink, drink
Pain keeps pounding in my head

[Outro - Fading Chant]
Drink
Drink
Drink
Drink

Don’t save me
Don’t save me
Don’t save me now

pages.caption: A late-night insomnia landscape where city lights bleed through windows, smoke catches heavy bass, and voices in the walls sound exactly lik

pages.vocalStyle: Hypnotic male lead with high-pitched ad-libs layered against airy female R&B background vocals

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Keeps sorrow pounding. Never misses a chant.

members.name: BACKING VOX
members.bio: Sinks deep into silence. Lets go without speaking.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Triggers heavy beats. Keeps the floor shaking.

members.name: PERCUSSION
members.bio: Adds ghostly chops. Textures the night.

members.name: BASS
members.bio: Drives the low end. Heavy and relentless.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Weaves eerie chords. Sets the surreal mood.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Pads the space. Adds warped reality.
